title: CMD.BSP.004.ENV.RECORD_CONSUMPTION — Record a transaction debit against an envelope
description: Payload of the RECORD_CONSUMPTION command. Issued by POL.BSP.004.ENV.ON_TRANSACTION_AUTHORIZED (placeholder until upstream BCM declares the SUB.BUSINESS.BSP.004.* subscription on EVT.BSP.004.TRANSACTION_AUTHORIZED). Handled by AGG.BSP.004.ENV.PERIOD_BUDGET. Always emits RVT.BSP.004.CONSUMPTION_RECORDED; conditionally emits RVT.BSP.004.ENVELOPE_CAP_REACHED in the same transaction when the envelope cap is reached. Idempotent on trigger.event_id over a 30-day window.

event_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Identifier of the upstream transaction-authorised resource event.

kind.description: Discriminator. Currently only TRANSACTION_AUTHORIZED is mapped; reserved for future extension.

occurred_at.description: Timestamp of the upstream transaction. Used for ordering, NOT for idempotency.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the participation case.

period_index.description: The currently ACTIVE period_index of the case.

category.description: Spending category of the transaction; must match an envelope of the active period budget.

amount.description: Positive debit amount to apply to the category envelope (programme currency).

transaction_id.description: Optional reference to the underlying transaction (for traceability and audit).
